description: A citizen wants to file a complaint about unsanitary conditions at a local restaurant.

nodes.task_description: Gather details of the complaint, including the restaurant name, address, and the specific nature of the violation.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent accurately documents the citizen's complaint.

nodes.task_description: Log the complaint in the health department's case management system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully creates a new complaint case.

nodes.task_description: Inform the citizen that the complaint has been received and will be assigned to a health inspector for follow-up.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides assurance that the complaint will be investigated.
